mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID, AMOUNT, TRANSACTION_TYPE, STATUS, PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{transactionId}, (SELECT ACCOUNT_ID FROM GROUP_ACCOUNT WHERE GROUP_ID = #{targetAccountId}), #{amount}, #{transactionType}, #{status}, #{paymentReferenceUid}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

SELECT SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID, AMOUNT, TRANSACTION_TYPE, STATUS, PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{transactionId}, (SELECT ACCOUNT_ID FROM GROUP_ACCOUNT WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}), #{amount}, 'QR_PAYMENT', 'SUCCESS', #{referenceUid}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
